focus_ring.rationale: The core Accent Gold (#D4A843) fails the 3:1 non-text contrast ratio against Pure White (2.2:1). Using this darker gold variant (#A87B1E) guarantees a compliant contrast ratio of 3.7:1 on White and 3.4:1 on Deep Charcoal, allowing a single consistent, highly visible focus indicator for visually impaired users across both themes.

component_mapping.header_bg_light: Pure White (#FFFFFF) background with a 2px Soft Grey (#DFE6E9) bottom border to establish clear layout structure without relying solely on shadows.
component_mapping.header_bg_dark: Deep Charcoal (#2D3436) background with a lighter gray-700 (#46555B) bottom border.
component_mapping.cta_button: Accent Gold (#D4A843) background with Deep Charcoal (#2D3436) text. NEVER use white text on gold buttons as it fails WCAG AA (2.2:1).
component_mapping.secondary_button: Soft Grey (#DFE6E9) background with Deep Charcoal (#2D3436) text for light mode, ensuring high readability (10.2:1).
component_mapping.card_bg_light: Pure White (#FFFFFF) with a 2px solid Soft Grey (#DFE6E9) border to provide stark, visible boundaries for visually impaired users.
component_mapping.card_bg_dark: Lighter Charcoal (#354045) background to pop against the Deep Charcoal (#2D3436) app background, keeping structural contrast high.
component_mapping.link_text_light: Dark Gold variant (#876319, primary-700) to ensure a safe 5.4:1 contrast ratio against Pure White backgrounds while retaining the brand accent.
component_mapping.link_text_dark: Base Accent Gold (#D4A843) provides a 5.7:1 contrast ratio against the Deep Charcoal background, making it perfectly legible and prominent.
component_mapping.selection_bg: Primary-200 (#E8D7B0) for light mode and Gray-700 (#46555B) for dark mode to highlight selected text clearly without diminishing text contrast below 4.5:1.

accessibility_notes: White text on the Accent Gold (#D4A843) background yields a 2.2:1 contrast ratio, failing WCAG AA requirements. Always use Deep Charcoal (#2D3436) text on Gold elements (5.7:1 ratio).

Accent Gold (#D4A843) text on Pure White (#FFFFFF) fails contrast requirements. For inline links and colored typography in Light Mode, map text components to the darker gold variant (#876319) which provides a compliant 5.4:1 ratio.

The focus ring color was adjusted to a darker gold (#A87B1E) to ensure it acts as a universal, WCAG-compliant (3:1+) non-text UI indicator across both extremely light and extremely dark backgrounds, reducing cognitive load for visually impaired users.
